---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or an improvement for inxi-rs
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Motivation

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature at a user-facing level.

## Why it belongs in inxi-rs

Please explain why this should be part of the current project scope rather than
an external wrapper or a future frontend.

## Safety impact

Would this change affect:

- read-only guarantees
- external command policy
- JSON contract
- CLI contract

If yes, explain how.
